title: After Hours German
subtitle: Short, illustrated German stories for adults: romantic, suspenseful, and easy to read.
description: Pick a story, tap difficult words, and move through each scene like a visual novella built for language learners.

stories.title: Lina in Berlin
stories.subtitle: An A1 German reader for adults — romantic, simple, and a little bit mysterious.
stories.blurb: Lina flies to Berlin to meet Max after weeks of flirty late-night calls. The chemistry is instant, but by morning something feels off.

stories.title: Sara in Berghain
stories.subtitle: An A2 German reader for adults — one reckless night, one impossible queue, one hand in the dark.
stories.blurb: After her last business trip meeting in Berlin, Sara decides that one final weekend in Europe cannot be polite. She joins the Berghain queue, worries she will be rejected, and steps into a darker world than she expected.

stories.title: Camille at Karaoke
stories.subtitle: An A2 German reader for adults — neon lights, shaky notes, and one beautiful distraction.
stories.blurb: Camille is a French woman living in Berlin. One lonely karaoke night turns electric when a dark-haired woman keeps watching her from the side of the stage.

stories.title: Nora on the Rooftop
stories.subtitle: An A2 German reader for adults — a rooftop drink, a beautiful couple, and one risky question.
stories.blurb: Nora wants one interesting Berlin night and meets a couple who make simple German feel much more dangerous. Act I ends at the taxi.
